ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: About what are they asking one another?
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: What are they asking one another about?

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: About the great news -
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: About the momentous news,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: That over which they are in disagreement.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: over which they disagree.

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: No! They are going to know.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: But no! They will come to know.

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Then, no! They are going to know.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Again, no! They will come to know.

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Have We not made the earth a resting place?
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Have We not smoothed out the earth ˹like a bed˺,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And the mountains as stakes?
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: and ˹made˺ the mountains as ˹its˺ pegs,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And We created you in pairs
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: and created you in pairs,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And made your sleep [a means for] rest
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: and made your sleep for rest,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And made the night as clothing
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: and made the night as a cover,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And made the day for livelihood
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: and made the day for livelihood,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And constructed above you seven strong [heavens]
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: and built above you seven mighty ˹heavens˺,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And made [therein] a burning lamp
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: and placed ˹in them˺ a shining lamp,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And sent down, from the rain clouds, pouring water
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: and sent down from rainclouds pouring water,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: That We may bring forth thereby grain and vegetation
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: producing by it grain and ˹various˺ plants,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And gardens of entwined growth.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: and dense orchards?

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Indeed, the Day of Judgement is an appointed time -
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Indeed, the Day of ˹Final˺ Decision is an appointed time—

ayahs.textArabic: يَوۡمَ يُنفَخُ فِي ٱلصُّورِ فَتَأۡتُونَ أَفۡوَاجٗا
ayahs.textTransliteration: Yawma yunfakhu fee alssoori fatatoona afwajan
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: The Day the Horn is blown and you will come forth in multitudes
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: ˹it is˺ the Day the Trumpet will be blown, and you will ˹all˺ come forth in crowds.

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And the heaven is opened and will become gateways
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: The sky will be ˹split˺ open, becoming ˹many˺ gates,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And the mountains are removed and will be [but] a mirage.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: and the mountains will be blown away, becoming ˹like˺ a mirage.

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Indeed, Hell has been lying in wait
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Indeed, Hell is lying in ambush

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: For the transgressors, a place of return,
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: as a home for the transgressors,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: In which they will remain for ages [unending].
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: where they will remain for ˹endless˺ ages.

ayahs.textArabic: لَّا يَذُوقُونَ فِيهَا بَرۡدٗا وَلَا شَرَابًا
ayahs.textTransliteration: La yathooqoona feeha bardan wala sharaban
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: They will not taste therein [any] coolness or drink
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: There they will not taste any coolness or drink,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Except scalding water and [foul] purulence -
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: except boiling water and ˹oozing˺ pus—

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: An appropriate recompense.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: a fitting reward.

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Indeed, they were not expecting an account
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: For they never expected any reckoning,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And denied Our verses with [emphatic] denial.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: and totally rejected Our signs.

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: But all things We have enumerated in writing.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: And We have everything recorded precisely.

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: "So taste [the penalty], and never will We increase you except in torment."
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: ˹So the deniers will be told,˺ “Taste ˹the punishment˺, for all you will get from Us is more torment.”

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Indeed, for the righteous is attainment -
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Indeed, the righteous will have salvation—

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Gardens and grapevines
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Gardens, vineyards,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And full-breasted [companions] of equal age
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: and full-bosomed maidens of equal age,

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: And a full cup.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: and full cups ˹of pure wine˺,

ayahs.textArabic: لَّا يَسۡمَعُونَ فِيهَا لَغۡوٗا وَلَا كِذَّٰبٗا
ayahs.textTransliteration: La yasmaAAoona feeha laghwan wala kiththaban
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: No ill speech will they hear therein or any falsehood -
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: never to hear any idle talk or lying therein—

ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: [As] reward from your Lord, [a generous] gift [made due by] account,
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: a ˹fitting˺ reward as a generous gift from your Lord,

ayahs.textArabic: رَّبِّ ٱلسَّمَٰوَٰتِ وَٱلۡأَرۡضِ وَمَا بَيۡنَهُمَا ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنِۖ لَا يَمۡلِكُونَ مِنۡهُ خِطَابٗا
ayahs.textTransliteration: Rabbi alssamawati waalardi wama baynahuma alrrahmani la yamlikoona minhu khitaban
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: [From] the Lord of the heavens and the earth and whatever is between them, the Most Merciful. They possess not from Him [authority for] speech.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: the Lord of the heavens and the earth and everything in between, the Most Compassionate. No one will dare speak to Him

ayahs.textArabic: يَوۡمَ يَقُومُ ٱلرُّوحُ وَٱلۡمَلَٰٓئِكَةُ صَفّٗاۖ لَّا يَتَكَلَّمُونَ إِلَّا مَنۡ أَذِنَ لَهُ ٱلرَّحۡمَٰنُ وَقَالَ صَوَابٗا
ayahs.textTransliteration: Yawma yaqoomu alrroohu waalmalaikatu saffan la yatakallamoona illa man athina lahu alrrahmanu waqala sawaban
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: The Day that the Spirit and the angels will stand in rows, they will not speak except for one whom the Most Merciful permits, and he will say what is correct.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: on the Day the ˹holy˺ spirit and the angels will stand in ranks. None will talk, except those granted permission by the Most Compassionate and whose words are true.

ayahs.textArabic: ذَٰلِكَ ٱلۡيَوۡمُ ٱلۡحَقُّۖ فَمَن شَآءَ ٱتَّخَذَ إِلَىٰ رَبِّهِۦ مَـَٔابًا
ayahs.textTransliteration: Thalika alyawmu alhaqqu faman shaa ittakhatha ila rabbihi maaban
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: That is the True Day; so he who wills may take to his Lord a [way of] return.
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: That Day is the ˹ultimate˺ truth. So let whoever wills take the path leading back to their Lord.

ayahs.textArabic: إِنَّآ أَنذَرۡنَٰكُمۡ عَذَابٗا قَرِيبٗا يَوۡمَ يَنظُرُ ٱلۡمَرۡءُ مَا قَدَّمَتۡ يَدَاهُ وَيَقُولُ ٱلۡكَافِرُ يَٰلَيۡتَنِي كُنتُ تُرَٰبَۢا
ayahs.textTransliteration: Inna antharnakum AAathaban qareeban yawma yanthuru almaro ma qaddamat yadahu wayaqoolu alkafiru ya laytanee kuntu turaban
ayahs.textEnglishSaheeh: Indeed, We have warned you of a near punishment on the Day when a man will observe what his hands have put forth and the disbeliever will say, "Oh, I wish that I were dust!"
ayahs.textEnglishMustafa: Indeed, We have warned you of an imminent punishment—the Day every person will see ˹the consequences of˺ what their hands have done, and the disbelievers will cry, “I wish I were dust.”
